data.body:
[Update Notice]

Main Story Vol.3 Eden Treaty Chapter 4 has been updated!
Check out episodes 1–10 of Kyrie of the Forgotten Gods, which is all about Mika's upcoming hearing and the Arius Squad.

#BlueArchive
